name: VibroSense Gm-C Band-Pass Filter Bank
description: 5 Tow-Thomas biquad BPFs covering 100-500Hz/500-2kHz/2-5kHz/5-10kHz/10-20kHz. Each uses 3 OTAs. MUST include bias-current tuning to compensate ±50% PVT frequency shift.
margin_rule: Each of 5 filters must pass independently. Worst-case corner reported.

f0_accuracy_pct.description: Center frequency accuracy at TT/27C (after nominal bias setting)

q_accuracy_pct.description: Q factor accuracy vs target per channel

tuning_range_pct.description: f0 tuning range via bias current (must cover all PVT)
